STS2_WINE_FOX_RELIC_HAND_CRANK.title: Hand Crank
STS2_WINE_FOX_RELIC_HAND_CRANK.descripti: At the start of the first turn of each combat, choose to gain [blue]{Stress}[/blue] [gold]Stress[/gold], or gain [blue]{Wood}[/blue] [gold]Plank[/gold] and [blue]{Stone}[/blue] [gold]Cobblestone[/gold].
STS2_WINE_FOX_RELIC_HAND_CRANK.flavor: Crank it up before anything else gets going.
STS2_WINE_FOX_RELIC_MAID_BACKPACK.title: Maid's Backpack
STS2_WINE_FOX_RELIC_MAID_BACKPACK.descri: When picked up, gain [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Potion Slots[/gold] and fill every empty slot with a random food.
STS2_WINE_FOX_RELIC_MAID_BACKPACK.flavor: A small backpack with a huge capacity, stuffed with all kinds of food the owner prepared.
STS2_WINE_FOX_RELIC_DEPLOYER.title: Deployer
STS2_WINE_FOX_RELIC_DEPLOYER.description: At the start of the first turn of each combat, choose to gain [blue]{Stress}[/blue] [gold]Stress[/gold], or gain [blue]{Wood}[/blue] [gold]Plank[/gold], [blue]{Stone}[/blue] [gold]Cobblestone[/gold] and [blue]{Iron}[/blue] [gold]Iron Ingot[/gold].
STS2_WINE_FOX_RELIC_DEPLOYER.flavor: An upgraded Hand Crank with more impressive results.
STS2_WINE_FOX_RELIC_SOPHISTICATED_BACKPA:
Provides extra craftable cards: backpack upgrades.
{UpgradeDescription}
A backpack that looks built to last; add all kinds of upgrades to expand what it can do.
At the start of each combat, draw [blue]{CombatStartDrawAmount}[/blue] additional cards.
At the start of each combat, draw [blue]{BaseDrawAmount}[/blue] additional cards.
At the start of each combat, draw [blue]{RestockDrawAmount}[/blue] additional cards.
At the start of each turn, gain [blue]{FeedingRegenAmount}[/blue] Regeneration.
At the start of each turn, gain [blue]{SmeltingIronAmount}[/blue] [gold]Iron Ingot[/gold].
Every [blue]{CraftThreshold}[/blue] times you [gold]Craft[/gold], you [gold]Craft[/gold] [blue]{CraftBonusAmount}[/blue] additional time(s).
At the end of combat, gain [blue]{SavingsGoldAmount}[/blue] additional Gold.
At the start of each combat, draw [blue]2[/blue] additional cards.
At the start of each turn, gain [blue]1[/blue] Regeneration.
STS2_WINE_FOX_RELIC_TOTEMOF_UNDYING.desc: When you would be killed, prevent it, heal [blue]{Heal}%[/blue] of your Max HP, gain [blue]10[/blue] Regeneration and [blue]15[/blue] Block. (Once)
STS2_WINE_FOX_RELIC_TOTEMOF_UNDYING.flav: A redemption beyond life and death. WineFox cannot fall yet.
STS2_WINE_FOX_RELIC_CREATIVE_MOTOR.title: Creative Motor
STS2_WINE_FOX_RELIC_CREATIVE_MOTOR.descr: The first time you lose [gold]Stress[/gold] each turn, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Stress[/gold].
STS2_WINE_FOX_RELIC_CREATIVE_MOTOR.flavo: It can spin all by itself!
STS2_WINE_FOX_RELIC_ORANGE_TIGER_CAKE.de: When picked up, gain [blue]8[/blue] Max HP, [blue]2[/blue] random foods, [blue]1[/blue] card reward set, and [blue]50[/blue] Gold.
STS2_WINE_FOX_RELIC_ORANGE_TIGER_CAKE.fl: Wow! A golden legend, meow! Delicious little cake.
